chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3044 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.13613/2024 2. For hearing of main case 19.12.2024 Mr. Arshad Hussain, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceedings initiated by the respondent Department, during the pendency of the appeal before the Commissioner (Appeals-III) Corporate Tax Office, Karachi. The respective learned counsel jointly state that it may be just and proper to dispose of this petition with directions for expeditious conclusion of the appeal, while restraining the recovery of the impugned demand in the interim period. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner (Appeals-III) Corporate Tax Office, Karachi, to decide the pending Appeal expeditiously; preferably within 60 days from the date hereof. However, the respondents shall not take any coercive action against the petitioner, in respect of the impugned demand, till the conclusion of the Appeal. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application(s). Judge Judge Amjad
